payload.$comment: Mirrors the cow-sdk app-data flashloan/v0.2.0 schema; shared primitives inlined from upstream definitions.json. Not resolved at runtime (ADR 0064).
payload.title: Flashloan
payload.description: Information about flashloan parameters for the order

amount.title: Loan amount
amount.description: The amount of tokens to be flash loaned (in token units, as uint256)

liquidityProvider.title: Liquidity provider address
liquidityProvider.description: The Ethereum address of the flashloan liquidity provider

protocolAdapter.title: Protocol adapter address
protocolAdapter.description: The Ethereum address of the protocol adapter

receiver.title: Receiver address
receiver.description: The Ethereum address of the flashloan receiver

token.title: Token address
token.description: The Ethereum address of the token being borrowed
